              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ObservationRange.interpretationCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAObservationInterpretation"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.code">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="N"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystem">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.5.83"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystemName">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystemVersion">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.displayName">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.originalText">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.qualifier">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.translation">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="precondition1"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1"/>
      <definition
                  value="The sdtc:precondition1 extension allows for the association of a criterion with a reference range (ObservationRange), which allows the expression in a lab report that a reference range is conditional on some criterion such as patient sex or age (or a combination of criterion)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ObservationRange.sdtcPrecondition1"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.realmCode">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Observation"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.displayable">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.root">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.extension">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.templateId">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeCode">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ObservationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.typeCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <fixedCode value="PRCN"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAActRelationshipType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.conjunctionCode">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.conjunctionCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="A code specifying the logical conjunction of the criteria among all the condition-links of Acts (e.g., and, or, exclusive-or).

All AND criteria must be true.

If OR and AND criteria occur together, one criterion out of the OR-group must be true and all AND criteria must be true also.

If XOR criteria occur together with OR and AND criteria, exactly one of the XOR criteria must be true, and at least one of the OR criteria and all AND criteria must be true.

In other words, the sets of AND, OR, and XOR criteria are in turn combined by a logical AND operator (all AND criteria and at least one OR criterion and exactly one XOR criterion)."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ObservationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.conjunctionCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-RelationshipConjunction|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.criterion1">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.criterion1"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ObservationRange.sdtcPrecondition1.criterion1"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Criterion"/>
      </type>
    </element>

    <element id="Observation.referenceRange">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange"/>
      <definition
                  value="Relates an Observation to the ObservationRange class, where the expected range of values for a particular observation can be specified."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Observation.referenceRange"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.realmCode">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeId">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Observation"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.root">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.templateId">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>

      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.referenceRange.typeCode">
      <path value="Observation.referenceRange.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <max value="1"/>

        <valueString value="inFulfillmentOf1"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InFulfillmentOf1"/>
      </type>
    </element>
  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="Observation.templateId">
      <path value="Observation.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="2"/>
      <max value="2"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.templateId:iheLaboratoryObservation">
      <path value="Observation.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheLaboratoryObservation"/>
      <short value="Conformité Laboratory Observation (IHE PaLM)"/>
      <definition value="Conformité Laboratory Observation (IHE PaLM)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.templateId:iheLaboratoryObservation.root">
      <path value="Observation.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1.6"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.templateId:frResultatExamensDeBiologieElementCliniquePertinent">
      <path value="Observation.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="frResultatExamensDeBiologieElementCliniquePertinent"/>
      <short
             value="Conformité FR-Resultat-examens-de-biologie-element-clinique-pertinent (CI-SIS)"/>
      <definition
                  value="Conformité FR-Resultat-examens-de-biologie-element-clinique-pertinent (CI-SIS)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.templateId:frResultatExamensDeBiologieElementCliniquePertinent.root">
      <path value="Observation.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.80"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.classCode">
      <path value="Observation.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="OBS"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.moodCode">
      <path value="Observation.moodCode"/>
      <patternCode value="EVN"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.id">
      <path value="Observation.id"/>
      <short value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code">
      <path value="Observation.code"/>
      <short value="Code d'identification de l'analyse ou de l'observation"/>
      <definition
                  value="Code d'identification de l'analyse ou de l'observation"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code.code">
      <path value="Observation.code.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Observation.code.codeSystem"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.6.1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code.displayName">
      <path value="Observation.code.displayName"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code.originalText">
      <path value="Observation.code.originalText"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code.originalText.reference">
      <path value="Observation.code.originalText.reference"/>
      <short
             value="Référence à l'expression verbale dans la partie visualisable du compte-rendu"/>
      <definition
                  value="Référence à l'expression verbale dans la partie visualisable du compte-rendu"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.code.translation">
      <path value="Observation.code.translation"/>
      <short
             value="Code d'identification d'attente national ou code de portée locale"/>
      <definition
                  value="Code d'identification d'attente national ou code de portée locale"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.statusCode">
      <path value="Observation.statusCode"/>
      <short
             value="Niveau de complétude.
- 'completed' si le résultat est présent ;
- 'aborted' dans le cas où l'élément d'examen n’a pu être et ne sera pas réalisé ;"/>
      <definition value="Niveau de complétude"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-hl7-v3-ActStatus-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.effectiveTime">
      <path value="Observation.effectiveTime"/>
      <short value="Date et heure de ce résultat"/>
      <definition value="Date et heure de ce résultat"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.value">
      <path value="Observation.value"/>
      <short
             value="Valeur du résultat. Le type de valeur (attribut xsi:type) est choisi dynamiquement. Les autres attributs qui qualifient cette valeur (comme par exemple l'unité) dépendent du type de donnée choisi. Les résultats qualitatifs codés peuvent le cas échéant être exprimés dans plusieurs systèmes de codage simultanément. De même les résultats numériques peuvent être exprimés simultanément dans plusieurs unités."/>
      <definition value="Valeur du résultat"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.interpretationCode">
      <path value="Observation.interpretationCode"/>
      <short value="Code d'interprétation"/>
      <definition value="Code d'interprétation"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-hl7-v3-ObservationInterpretation-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.methodCode">
      <path value="Observation.methodCode"/>
      <short value="Méthode ou technique employée"/>
      <definition value="Méthode ou technique employée"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-technique-biologie-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.subject">
      <path value="Observation.subject"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Subject"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-sujet-non-humain"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-patient-avec-sujet-non-humain"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.performer">
      <path value="Observation.performer"/>
      <short
             value="Laboratoire sous-traitant. Apparaît à ce niveau si et et seulement si ce résultat a été produit par un laboratoire exécutant distinct du laboratoire exécutant déclaré aux niveaux supérieurs."/>
      <definition value="Laboratoire sous-traitant"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Performer2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-laboratoire-executant"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.author">
      <path value="Observation.author"/>
      <short
             value="Auteur. Apparaît à ce niveau si le rendu de ce  résultat procède de cet auteur spécifique, différent de celui déclaré aux niveaux supérieurs."/>
      <definition value="Auteur"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Author"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.participant">
      <path value="Observation.participant"/>
      <short
             value="Valideur de ces résultats : typeCode='AUTHEN' [0..1] et templateId '1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.3.1.5' additionnel obligatoire. 
- Responsable de cet examen : typeCode='RESP' [0..1]
- Dispositif automatique impliqué dans la production des résultats : typeCode='DEV' [0..*]"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Participant2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-participant-corps"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="$this"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frCommentaireER">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frCommentaireER"/>
      <short value="Commentaire d'interprétation des résultats"/>
      <definition value="Commentaire d'interprétation des résultats"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frCommentaireER.typeCode">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="SUBJ"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frCommentaireER.act">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-commentaire-er"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frPrelevement">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frPrelevement"/>
      <short value="Prélèvement"/>
      <definition value="Prélèvement"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frPrelevement.typeCode">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frPrelevement.procedure">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.procedure"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Procedure"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-prelevement"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frResultatsAnterieurs"/>
      <short
             value="Résultats antérieurs. Plusieurs résultats antérieurs peuvent être ajoutés. Ils doivent être comparables avec le résultat rendu, c'est-à-dire obtenus suivant la même méthode ou une méthode comparable, et exprimés dans la même unité ou dans le même système de codage."/>
      <definition value="Résultats antérieurs"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.typeCode">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="REFR"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.classCode">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="OBS"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.moodCode">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.moodCode"/>
      <patternCode value="EVN"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.code">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.code"/>
      <short value="Même code que l'observation de niveau supérieur"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.code.originalText">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.code.originalText"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.code.originalText.reference">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.code.originalText.reference"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.code.translation">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.code.translation"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.statusCode.code">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.statusCode.code"/>
      <patternCode value="completed"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.effectiveTime">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.effectiveTime"/>
      <short value="Date de ce résultat antérieur"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.value">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.value"/>
      <short value="Valeur de ce résultat antérieur"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.interpretationCode">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.interpretationCode"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-hl7-v3-ObservationInterpretation-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.methodCode">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.methodCode"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange">
      <path value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.classCode">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="OBS"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.value">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.value"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.code">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.code"/>
      <patternCode value="N"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Observation.entryRelationship:frResultatsAnterieurs.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystem">
      <path
            value="Observation.entryRelationship.observation.referenceRange.observationRange.interpretationCode.codeSystem"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.5.83"/>
    </element>
  </differential>
</StructureDefinition>
